business_description.nature_of_business: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas

coverages_discussed.notes: Policy Number GL-HCHP-2025-3351; Form GL 00 01 04 13; Deductible $5,000
Separate aggregate per designated construction project per endorsement CG 25 03

coverages_discussed.coverage_type: Commercial General Liability - Products-Completed Operations Aggregate
coverages_discussed.notes: Products-Completed Ops Aggregate not modified by CG 25 03 endorsement

coverages_discussed.coverage_type: Commercial General Liability - Personal and Advertising Injury
Commercial General Liability - Damage to Rented Premises

coverages_discussed.notes: Coverage C - Medical Payments; covers accidents on owned or rented premises or arising out of operations within coverage territory

positives: Waiver of subrogation endorsement included (CG 24 04) covering ongoing operations and products-completed operations hazard
Additional insured coverage extended to owners, lessees, or contractors for ongoing operations (CG 20 10)
Additional insured coverage extended for completed operations (CG 20 37)
Separate general aggregate limit per designated construction project (CG 25 03)
Defense costs are outside and supplementary to policy limits per Supplementary Payments provision
concerns: Exclusion endorsement CG 21 44 (07 98) eliminates coverage for bodily injury or property damage arising out of operations or ownership, maintenance, or use of designated premises listed in endorsement schedule
Hospitality sector with restaurant and event operations presents elevated premises liability exposure
Operations span multiple locations across Central and South Texas increasing geographic exposure

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas. SIC Code 7011. Policy covers bodily injury, property damage, personal and advertising injury, and medical payments arising from premises, operations, products, and completed work.
